sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Credicorp (NYSE: BAP) sets S/50 per share dividend from 2025 earnings
feed.summary: Credicorp Ltd. has approved a significant cash dividend of S/50.0000 per share, totaling S/4,719,115,850.00, from its 2025 net income. This dividend will be paid on June 12, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 18, 2026, in U.S. dollars and will not be subject to withholding tax at source. The decision represents a substantial return of earnings to shareholders, following an initial allocation to voluntary reserves and retained earnings.

feed.title: Acuity Brands Outdoor LED Lighting Helps Wisconsin Healthcare Provider Achieve Energy Savings Goals
feed.summary: ThedaCare health system, a Wisconsin-based healthcare provider, selected outdoor LED lighting from Acuity Brands to enhance safety, reduce energy consumption, and lower maintenance costs at two of its campuses. By replacing 84 high-pressure sodium and metal halide fixtures with 60 D-Series LED luminaires from Lithonia Lighting, the system expects to save over $40,000 annually in energy costs. The project, including D-Series Area LED luminaires, Wallpacks, Floodlights, and Parking Garage luminaires, also significantly improved light quality and security camera visibility while reducing light pollution.

feed.title: Hyperscale Data: $50 Million Bitcoin Treasury Milestone Reached As AI Data Center Company Advances Toward $100 Million Goal
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data announced its Bitcoin treasury has surpassed $50 million for the second time, holding approximately 663.3130 Bitcoin. This milestone moves the company closer to its $100 million digital asset reserve goal, using both mining operations and market purchases. The company plans to continue deploying capital into Bitcoin and aims to divest Ault Capital Group in Q2 2027 to focus on data center operations and digital asset holdings.

feed.title: Why Coca-Cola has made World Cup TV ads one part of its sports marketing play
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's Powerade brand launched its "Power Your Fate" campaign for the FIFA World Cup 2026, featuring athletes and creators across 50 markets. The strategy emphasizes a social-first, 360-degree approach, integrating TV ads with platform-native content, athlete storytelling, and influencer collaborations. Coca-Cola aims to engage fans where they already are, utilizing both digital platforms and real-life activations to encourage user-generated content and shared experiences.

feed.title: Tencent and Alibaba in Talks to Invest in DeepSeek AI Startup | 2026 Funding Round - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. are reportedly in discussions to invest in Chinese AI startup DeepSeek's first funding round. Tencent has proposed acquiring up to a 20% stake, while DeepSeek, valued similarly to rivals like MiniMax Group Inc. (around $40 billion), is hesitant to give up that much control. Both tech giants are already investors in MiniMax and are vying for dominance in China's AI sector, keen to provide cloud computing services to burgeoning AI startups.

feed.title: ANDE (NASDAQ: ANDE) insider Patrick Bowe reports multiple sales, 03/16–04/22/2026
feed.summary: Patrick E. Bowe, an insider at Andersons, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANDE), reported multiple sales of common stock via Form 144 filings between March 16, 2026, and April 22, 2026. The filings detail seven separate dispositions, including the number of shares sold and the aggregate proceeds for each trade. Additionally, the filing notes a Restricted Stock Vesting event on February 14, 2024, related to compensation.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Texas Instruments (TXN) and Teledyne Technologies (TDY)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish ratings for technology companies Texas Instruments (TXN) and Teledyne Technologies (TDY). TD Cowen analyst Joshua Buchalter set a Buy rating and $300.00 price target for Texas Instruments, while Joseph C Giordano, also from TD Cowen, maintained a Buy rating for Teledyne Technologies with a $750.00 price target. Both companies currently hold a Moderate Buy consensus rating from analysts, with Texas Instruments facing a slight downside from current levels and Teledyne Technologies showing an upside potential.

feed.title: Strategy Stock Rises 9.4% on Institutional Buy, Surpasses BlackRock as Top Bitcoin Holder - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Shares of Strategy surged by 9.4% following an institutional investor's purchase of 4.32 million shares worth $747 million and the company's announcement of becoming the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, surpassing BlackRock. Strategy now holds 815,061 BTC after acquiring an additional 34,160 coins for approximately $2.54 billion. Analysts have raised price targets for the volatile stock, which though up 13.1% year-to-date, remains significantly below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Trimble Korea to Host BIM Innovation Conference 2026 in Seoul
feed.summary: Trimble Korea will host the BIM Innovation Conference 2026 in Seoul on April 28 to focus on the practical changes AI will bring to the built environment. The company plans to unveil new features of Tekla 2026 and introduce its agentic AI applications, including AI-driven automation for steel structure modeling and smart workflows connecting design and construction. This event aims to demonstrate how AI can generate business value across the entire construction lifecycle, from design to execution.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
feed.source_domain: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media

feed.title: ACES Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of ALPS Clean Energy ETF (ACES) stock, detailing its current price of $35.79 and a 64.0% gain over the past year. It includes performance charts, news, financial highlights (though most TTM data is unavailable), and short interest trends, noting a relatively low short interest indicating limited bearish sentiment. The article also mentions the recent news of the ETF transferring its listing to NYSE Arca, which coincided with positive price movement.

feed.title: Alarm.com (NASDAQ: ALRM) details 2026 director elections, auditor and say-on-pay
feed.summary: Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALRM) has announced the agenda for its upcoming June 3, 2026, annual stockholders' meeting. Key items for shareholder vote include the election of eight directors, the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for 2026, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The company's proxy statement highlights its 2025 financial performance, including a 9.2% increase in SaaS and license revenue to $689.4 million and a 7.6% rise in total revenue to $1.0112 billion, which underpins its pay-for-performance executive compensation philosophy.

feed.title: [RW] Amesite Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Amesite Inc. has filed Form RW with the SEC, requesting the immediate withdrawal of its S-1 Registration Statement (File No. 333-295187). The company stated it has elected not to pursue the sale of securities contemplated by the Registration Statement at this time, and confirmed no securities were sold. The filing was made on April 23, 2026, and indicates a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Xiao-I to implement ADS ratio change
feed.summary: Xiao-I (AIXI) announced a change in the ratio of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) to ordinary shares, moving from one ADS representing one-third of an ordinary share to one ADS representing 60 ordinary shares. This change, expected to be effective around May 11, will function as a one-for-twenty reverse ADS split for current ADS holders, proportionally increasing the ADS trading price. The company's ADSs will continue to trade on Nasdaq under "AIXI," with no impact on the underlying ordinary shares.

feed.title: How GM helps fleets get ready to go electric
feed.summary: GM Fleet assists companies in transitioning to electric fleets through tools like the Electrification Analysis, which includes driver surveys and telematics analysis to create tailored EV roadmaps. This service helps address concerns like range anxiety and charging logistics, as demonstrated by companies like McKinstry and Delta Leasing. Both firms have successfully integrated Silverado EVs into their operations, reporting significant cost savings and adaptability even in extreme conditions.

feed.title: Academy Sports & Outdoors offering branded Mastercard
feed.summary: Academy Sports + Outdoors is launching a branded Mastercard credit card program. Cardholders will receive 5% back on Academy purchases, 2% back on gas and grocery, and 1% on all other purchases, with rewards redeemable for Academy merchandise.

feed.title: Agenus Names BAP Pharma as Exclusive Global Partner for BOT+BAL Access Programs
feed.summary: Agenus Inc. has partnered exclusively with BAP Pharma to manage global access programs for its botensilimab (BOT) plus balstilimab (BAL) therapies. This collaboration aims to provide compliant, patient-focused access to BOT+BAL through authorized pathways, including France's AAC program and named-patient programs in other countries. The partnership will streamline operations and logistics for patients with serious cancers, addressing a growing global demand for these therapies.

feed.title: Webuy Global Awards CEO Share-Based Pay and Sells High-Vote Stock in April 2026 Deals
feed.summary: Webuy Global's board approved granting CEO Bin Xue 300,000 Class A shares as 2026 supplemental compensation, valued at $351,000, which are subject to a 12-month lock-up. Additionally, Xue purchased 100,000 high-vote Class B ordinary shares for $117,000, increasing his voting influence. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates WBUY stock as "Underperform" due to poor financial performance and high leverage.

feed.title: Ameris Bancorp reports Q1 EPS $1.63, consensus $1.55
feed.summary: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) reported strong Q1 results, with EPS of $1.63, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.55. CEO Palmer Proctor highlighted expanding ROA, return on average tangible common equity, and margin, alongside robust revenue, loan, and deposit growth. The company also engaged in significant share repurchases during the quarter.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Margin Hold At 15% Tests Long Term Earnings Concerns
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) reported Q4 2025 revenue of US$12.2 billion and basic EPS of US$5.22, with trailing twelve-month revenue at US$44.6 billion and a net margin of 15%. While recent profitability improved with 5.8% earnings growth, this stands against a five-year earnings decline of 6.1% annually, raising concerns about long-term growth and debt coverage despite a P/E ratio below the industry average. The company's current valuation and forecasts present a mixed picture for investors weighing growth potential against historical performance and financial flexibility.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) After A 27% One-Year Rally?
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) has seen a 27% rally over the last year, prompting questions about its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 51.5%, while its P/E ratio also indicates it is undervalued compared to a proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article provides bull and bear case narratives, with fair value anchors ranging from US$45.67 to US$65.00 per share, offering investors different perspectives for their decision-making.

feed.title: DTE vows 2-year pause on rate hike requests after proposing $474.3 million investment
feed.summary: DTE Energy has announced a commitment to pause rate hike requests for at least two years after submitting a new request for $474.3 million to enhance its electric grid and power generation. This proposed investment aims to support reliability improvements, convert the Belle River Power Plant to natural gas, and develop the Trenton Channel Energy Center, following a previous $242.4 million investment earlier in the year. The company emphasizes affordability for customers and highlights improved reliability performance, linking the pause in rate requests to the successful integration of data center projects.

feed.title: Obamas Say No More Netflix Exclusivity After Academy Award Win, Eighth Most-Watched Film: Here's What Happens Next
feed.summary: The exclusive partnership between Netflix and Higher Ground Productions, founded by Barack and Michelle Obama, is ending. Higher Ground, responsible for hits like "Leave the World Behind" and Academy Award-winning "American Factory," is transitioning to an independent company to work with multiple studios. While a first-look deal with Netflix remains, Higher Ground will also produce content for other platforms, such as an upcoming series for HBO starring Larry David.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Targa Resources (TRGP) 25% Dividend Hike Signaling Management Confidence
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. recently increased its quarterly cash dividend by 25% to US$1.25 per share, signaling management's confidence in the business. This dividend hike comes alongside significant growth investments in Permian gas plants and NGL pipelines. Investors should consider how rising project costs and inflation might affect these expansions despite the positive signal from the increased dividend.

feed.title: Full Truck Alliance: Short-Term Headwinds Do Not Invalidate Longer-Term Growth Prospects
feed.summary: Full Truck Alliance (YMM) has experienced a market cap decline and growth slowdown following its October high, attributed to temporary headwinds. The author believes these headwinds are temporary, suggesting growth could re-accelerate. The article argues that current lower valuations present an opportunity, leading to a bullish "buy" rating on YMM.

feed.title: Lee & Ko, Palo Alto Networks forge Korea-focused cyber incident alliance - CHOSUNBIZ
feed.summary: Lee & Ko and Palo Alto Networks have formed an alliance to address cyber incidents specifically in Korea. This collaboration aims to leverage their respective expertise to improve cybersecurity responses in the region.

feed.title: Westamerica Bancorporation Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend, Payable on May 15, 2026
feed.summary: Westamerica Bancorporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.48 per share, marking a two-cent increase from the previous quarter. The dividend will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. This announcement includes details on the company's recent financial results and its banking operations across Northern and Central California.

feed.title: Axsome Therapeutics (NASDAQ:AXSM) Insider Sells $1,368,150.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Axsome Therapeutics insider Ari Maizel sold 7,500 shares of the company's stock, valued at $1,368,150. This transaction reduced his position by 50%. The company recently reported better-than-expected EPS and revenue, but remains unprofitable, though analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $218.06.

feed.title: BioCryst appoints Charlie Gayer to succeed Jon Stonehouse as CEO
feed.summary: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals has appointed Charlie Gayer as its new CEO, succeeding Jon Stonehouse. Further details regarding this transition are expected to be available in the full article.

feed.title: Brandywine Realty Trust Q1 FFO Of US$20 Million Tests Bearish Leverage Concerns
feed.summary: Brandywine Realty Trust (BDN) reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$127.0 million with a basic EPS loss of US$0.28 and funds from operations (FFO) of US$20.0 million. The company's TTM FFO stands at US$88.7 million against a net income loss of US$201.0 million, raising leverage concerns among bears due to slower revenue growth and high interest risk, despite an attractive valuation with a P/S of 1.2x and a share price below its DCF fair value. Bulls believe development upside and recapitalizations are underappreciated, suggesting potential if cash flows remain resilient despite negative net income forecasts.

feed.title: ATS Corporation CEO Andrew Hider steps down; Ryan McLeod appointed interim CEO
feed.summary: Andrew Hider has stepped down as CEO of ATS Corporation. Ryan McLeod has been appointed as the interim CEO, effective immediately. The company will be seeking a permanent replacement for the position.

feed.title: US GoldMining Inc - enters amendment to warrant agency agreement on April 23, 2026 - SEC filing
feed.summary: US GoldMining Inc. announced it entered an amendment to its warrant agency agreement on April 23, 2026, as detailed in an SEC filing. The company focuses on its 100% owned Whistler Gold-Copper Project in Alaska, which holds significant gold equivalent resources. This news follows other recent updates regarding their exploration programs and financial results.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Targa Resources (TRGP) 25% Dividend Hike Signaling Management Confidence
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. has announced a 25% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to US$1.25 per share, signaling management's confidence in the company's business ahead of its upcoming earnings release. This dividend hike, consistent with previous guidance, aligns with Targa's significant growth investments in Permian gas plants and NGL pipelines. Investors, however, are encouraged to consider the potential impact of rising project costs and inflation on these expansions, as well as differing fair value estimates among the Simply Wall St Community.

feed.title: Judge rejects Elevance Health’s lawsuit over medicare advantage ratings
feed.summary: A judge has dismissed Elevance Health's lawsuit challenging Medicare Advantage ratings. This decision prevents the insurer from forcing a review of its star ratings, which significantly impact bonus payments. The court found that Elevance Health did not exhaust all administrative remedies before filing the suit.

feed.title: Transcript: Travelzoo Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Travelzoo reported a 5% year-over-year revenue increase to $24.3 million in Q1 2026, maintaining an operating profit of $3.4 million. The company significantly boosted marketing spend to acquire new club members, resulting in a 112% year-over-year growth in club membership. Despite geopolitical challenges impacting advertising revenue, Travelzoo is optimistic about future profitability driven by predictable membership fees and new member benefits.

feed.title: TVA, Tenaska investing $300M into Hawkins Co. battery storage system
feed.summary: The Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) and Tenaska are investing $300 million to build a new 225-megawatt battery storage system in Hawkins County, Tennessee's Phipps Bend Industrial Park. The "Bobwhite Energy Storage Project" will operate similarly to charging a cell phone, storing energy during off-peak hours and releasing it during peak demand. This 20-year agreement is expected to generate approximately $1 million in annual property tax revenue for Hawkins County, with construction slated to begin in 2027 and the system coming online in 2029.

feed.title: Is Dividend Stability Amid Wells Fargo Downgrade Altering The Investment Case For Sherwin-Williams (SHW)?
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams recently declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.80 per share while simultaneously facing a Wells Fargo downgrade due to concerns about volume pressure and rising raw material costs. This situation highlights a conflict between the company's commitment to returning cash to shareholders and the operational challenges impacting its margins and demand. Investors are advised to consider how future earnings will support both ongoing dividend payouts and growth investments, especially given the potential for sustained margin pressure.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Wixcom WIX After A Sharp Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Wix.com (WIX) has experienced significant share price volatility, including an 18.3% decline over 30 days and a 56.4% fall over the past year, prompting a reassessment of its valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is currently "ABOUT RIGHT" at $71.97, estimated at $68.43 per share, indicating it's roughly 5.2% overvalued. However, comparing its P/E ratio of 82.9x against the IT industry average of 22.1x and Simply Wall St’s Fair Ratio of 41.3x, the company appears "OVERVALUED."

feed.title: Certain Pre-Funded Warrants of Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. are subject to a Lock-Up Agreement Ending on 24-APR-2026.
feed.summary: Certain Pre-Funded Warrants of Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. are under a lock-up agreement set to expire on April 24, 2026. This lock-up period began on March 24, 2026, lasting 31 days. The agreement prevents company executives, directors, and director-affiliated funds from selling or offering to sell any securities without prior consent from Jefferies LLC.

feed.title: Extreme drought putting strain on lake levels across Middle TN, TVA says
feed.summary: Ongoing dry conditions are causing low lake and river levels in Middle Tennessee, according to the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) and the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Nashville District. Due to a lack of significant spring rainfall, reservoirs are much lower than typical for this time of year, with some, like Wolf Creek and Dale Hollow, experiencing their lowest April levels in over a decade. Water must be strategically released to balance hydropower and navigation needs while preserving already low levels.

feed.title: [Form 4] Wellgistics Health, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Wellgistics Health, Inc.'s CEO, Prashant Patel, received 5,000,000 shares of common stock at $0.20 per share and 5,000,000 warrants with a $0.01 exercise price as compensation on March 31, 2026. These transactions, which increased his direct holdings to over 9 million shares, were reported in a Form 4 filing and are exempt from registration under Section 4(a)(2) of the Securities Act of 1933. The filing indicates a very high impact and neutral sentiment.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE: Trip.com Group (TCOM) Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Trip.com Class Action Lawsuit- Hagens Berman
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Trip.com Group (TCOM) after a 17% decline in stock price following an investigation by Chinese regulators into alleged monopolistic practices. The lawsuit seeks to represent investors who purchased Trip.com securities between April 30, 2024, and January 13, 2026. The firm urges investors with substantial losses to come forward as it investigates whether Trip.com misled investors about its AI pricing tool and business model sustainability.

feed.title: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. Announces Initiation of Common Stock Cash Dividend, Payable on June 15, 2026
feed.summary: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. has announced the initiation of a cash dividend for its common stock. The board of directors declared a dividend of $0.20 per common share, which will be payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The company's common shares are traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol "TCBI."

feed.title: Oncology Institute (NASDAQ: TOI) chief files Form 4 with no trades
feed.summary: Jeffrey Langsam, Chief Clinical Officer of Oncology Institute (NASDAQ: TOI), filed a Form 4 indicating his executive status but reported no stock transactions. The filing shows no purchases, sales, exercises, gifts, or other changes in his stated beneficial ownership. This Form 4 is primarily administrative, recording no alteration to his holdings during the period.

feed.title: Oncology Institute (TOI) CAO Kristin England files Form 4 showing no insider trades
feed.summary: Oncology Institute (TOI) Chief Administrative Officer Kristin England has filed a Form 4, indicating no insider trades during the reported period. The filing details zero purchases, sales, derivative exercises, gifts, tax withholdings, or restructuring-related transfers. This neutral filing suggests no change in her reported holdings.

feed.title: KeyCorp to acquire UK-based Clearwater Corporate Finance, terms undisclosed
feed.summary: The provided article content is insufficient to generate a summary. The input is "MSN", which is a content platform, not the article content itself.

feed.title: Earnings Beat, New Director And Dividends Could Be A Game Changer For Edison International (EIX)
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, declared preference stock dividends, and appointed M. Susan Hardwick to its boards. These developments, along with rising electricity demand from data centers, highlight the company's earnings potential and governance amid ongoing wildfire risk management concerns. While these positive updates are significant, investors are still weighing the impact of unresolved wildfire litigation and evolving cost recovery rules.

feed.title: Assessing Tower Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:TSEM) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Tower Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:TSEM) has seen significant share price momentum, with a 56.5% return over 90 days, bringing its stock price to US$201.27. Despite this, the company is considered 16.3% overvalued with a narrative fair value of $173.00, according to analysts' consensus. The valuation relies on assumptions of ambitious growth and margin improvements, but also faces risks from heavy CapEx commitments and concentrated technology exposure.

feed.title: BofA, EY Strike $2.5M Deal To Settle MOVEit Breach Claims
feed.summary: Bank of America and EY have reached a $2.5 million settlement to resolve claims stemming from the May 2023 MOVEit file transfer application breach. The settlement will benefit approximately 200,000 individuals impacted by the data breach and comes as part of multidistrict litigation.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services Group Stock Analysis: Outperformance vs. Underlying Concerns in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group has shown strong stock performance, outperforming the S&P 500 by 19.7% over the last six months with its stock price rising to $228.02. However, analysts advise caution due to concerns about its net interest income growth, low net interest margin, and projected decrease in tangible book value per share. The report suggests that despite a reasonable current valuation of 1.5 times forward price-to-book ratio, it may not present a significant buying opportunity.

feed.title: Alibaba Leads Asia-Pacific IaaS Market With 22.5% Share in 2025, Gartner Says
feed.summary: Alibaba Cloud secured the top position in the Asia-Pacific Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS) market for 2025 with a 22.5% share, according to Gartner. This growth is attributed to strategic investments in AI-optimized infrastructure and a focus on enterprise AI demand. Globally, Alibaba Cloud was the fourth-largest IaaS provider, with its market share increasing to 7.7%.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
